title: Tower Of Linkin (Tower Of Heaven & Linkin Park Mashup)
description:
Músicas 8bit com vocal ficam boas!

No music belongs to me, they are either property of Linkin Park and/or flashygoodness.

http://flashygoodness.bandcamp.com/album/tower-of-heaven-original-soundtrack - 1 dólar pela trilha de Tower Of Heaven. Ajudem o flashygoodness, ele merece \o

Higher quality (with an extra song) here: https://guilhox.bandcamp.com/album/mashox
